positive: A vibrant, stylized minimalist scene featuring a large, playful Bengal tiger silhouette leaping over a single, winding jungle vine. The tiger should be rendered in bold, contrasting lines, incorporating abstract geometric patterns that mimic natural fur details. The background should be a highly stylized, deep tropical jungle pattern in shades of teal, emerald, and burnt orange, maintaining high contrast and negative space. Use a clean, illustrative vector art style with crisp outlines suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Perfect central composition, graphic design poster style, high resolution, cinematic lighting.
negative: blurry, messy, gradient, text, writing, watermark, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, artifact, signature, logo, typography, photographic
